title: Research general entity news threshold options

log.context: Research general entity news threshold options

Here is the research summary, formatted for two Discord messages:

---

**Message 1 — API/Source Options**

**Google News RSS** — free, no key, no rate limit. Query: `https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=<entity>&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en`. Returns ~10 results per query. No auth, no quota. Downside: XML parsing, no article count/metadata, Google can change format anytime.
